ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the restaurant */,
  "outdoor_seating" INTEGER /* Indicates if outdoor seating is available */,
  "accepts_credit_cards" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant accepts credit cards */,
  "take_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if takeout is available */,
  "price_range" INTEGER /* Price range category of the restaurant */,
  "wifi" TEXT /* Availability of WiFi in the restaurant */,
  "parking_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of parking */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "stars" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the owner of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES restaurant_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the restaurant to which the category belongs */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Restaurants, Coffee & Tea) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who made the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Content of the user's review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "useful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "funny_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review funny */,
  "cool_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review cool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hours entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time for the restaurant */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time for the restaurant */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is open on the given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_hours_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user accessing the restaurant */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, review) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the restaurant (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to access the restaurant (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who favorited the restaurant */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant that has been favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior, food) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_images_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for owner authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the restaurant */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("business_id")
)
